default.title: Islamic Hubb Institute | Authentic Islamic Education
default.description: Premier Islamic education institute offering Quran studies, Arabic language, Fiqh, and Islamic sciences. Join thousands of students worldwide seeking authentic knowledge.

home.title: Islamic Hubb Institute | Authentic Islamic Education
home.description: Begin your journey of Islamic knowledge with qualified scholars. Quran memorization, Arabic language, Fiqh, and more. Join our global learning community.

about.title: About Us | Islamic Hubb Institute
about.description: Learn about Islamic Hubb Institute's mission to provide authentic Islamic education. Founded in 2015, we've served over 5,000 students worldwide.

courses.title: Courses | Islamic Hubb Institute
courses.description: Explore our comprehensive Islamic courses: Quran memorization, Arabic language, Fiqh, Aqeedah, Hadith, and more. Suitable for all levels.

programs.title: Programs | Islamic Hubb Institute
programs.description: Structured learning programs from Foundations of Islam to Scholar Track. Choose the path that fits your goals and schedule.

instructors.title: Our Instructors | Islamic Hubb Institute
instructors.description: Learn from qualified scholars with decades of experience. Our instructors hold degrees from prestigious Islamic universities worldwide.

events.title: Events | Islamic Hubb Institute
events.description: Join our seminars, workshops, and conferences. Learn, connect, and grow with the Islamic Hubb community.

contact.title: Contact Us | Islamic Hubb Institute
contact.description: Get in touch with Islamic Hubb Institute. Visit our campus in Dubai or reach us online. We're here to help you start your learning journey.

faq.title: FAQ | Islamic Hubb Institute
faq.description: Find answers to frequently asked questions about admissions, courses, fees, and more at Islamic Hubb Institute.
